---
title: Oskar Pemberlake
type: person
aliases: [oskar]
summary: Founder of Frostpetal Systems.
---

Oskar Pemberlake is the founder of Frostpetal Systems. Oskar shipped the v2 launch two weeks ahead of plan.

---
title: Frostpetal Systems
type: company
summary: Seed-stage company. Founded by Oskar Pemberlake.
---

Frostpetal Systems is a seed-stage company. Founded by Oskar Pemberlake. The seed conversation started in 2025.

turns.text: Just wrapped the Frostpetal Systems call with Oskar Pemberlake.
Oskar prefers async updates over standing calls. Noted for next time.
Oskar said Frostpetal Systems hit their growth target a month early. Ahead of plan.
